parameters.text: =Summarize world news and tech news from the last 24 hours. Skip your comments. The titles should be "World news:" and "Tech news:" Today is {{ $today }}

parameters.content: ### Double click here to see the results:

### 📰 Daily AI Summary


This workflow gets the latest news and asks AI to summarize it for you.

⭐ Bonus: Send the summary via email by connecting your Gmail account

▶ Watch the video to get started

parameters.subject: Your news daily summary
